category_sources: source_facts.description identifies zip as a compression and file packaging/archive utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Info-ZIP Zip page.
source_facts.name gives the project name as zip.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Info-ZIP Zip page and best official documentation surface supplied for the utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive points to an official SourceForge release archive, but no official source-control repository URL is supplied or confirmed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes a compression and file packaging/archive utility.
source_facts.executables lists command-line Zip utilities including zip, zipcloak, zipnote, and zipsplit.
